title: Maclean, Rachel – Minister of State for Housing and Planning at the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government – ACOBA advice
body: "The Rt Hon Rachel Maclean left her role as Minister of State for Housing and Planning at the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government in November 2023  Director of Strategy to the Leader of the Opposition, The Conservative Party  The Rt Hon Rachel Maclean sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an unpaid role with the Conservative Party. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in December 2024; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  "
